response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with geospatial data through his GISCollective project, which aligns partially with the routing tiling role. However, his recent work lacks deep C++ or Rust experience, and his focus has been on web, mobile, and AI-agent infrastructure rather than low-latency geospatial data pipelines or navigation systems.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective), demonstrating familiarity with the domain.
Proven ability to build scalable, event-driven systems using modern technologies (Node.js, Kubernetes).
Strong problem-solving skills and a track record of contributing to open-source projects and tooling.
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages required for the role.
Most recent work focuses on full-stack web development and AI-agent infrastructure, not low-latency geospatial pipelines.
No explicit mention of experience with navigation systems, routing algorithms, or real-time traffic integration.
